creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #2)
> While here, is the patch under files/ really needed any longer? Seems like
> it can be upstreamed or removed. Also I'd suggest to add MAKE_ARGS=     V=1
> to verbosify build. Otherwise looks good and builds file, awaiting
> maintainer's feedback.

Oops, that belonged to some other PR.
